content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "There is real movement in the client's turns — he goes from confidently asserting 'fear isn't really my deal' and 'that's probably the whole story' (turns 1, 5) to noticing 'I'm saying all the right things, aren't I' (turn 9), to a stilled, quieter 'like asking if a bridge is happy... which is a strange thing to say about your father' (turn 13). The smooth, even-keeled surface cracks slightly; pace slows, the wry smile becomes 'quieter than before.' However, the specific breakthrough_condition for this profile was NOT met: the client never noticed that 'fine' has a quality — a flatness, a not-quite-here-ness happening right now in the body. The coach skipped the numbness-as-felt-texture layer entirely and instead routed the conversation into biographical/father territory and a reframe question about identity ('is steady what you actually are?'). The client touched flatness conceptually ('it's not hot, it's not generating heat,' 'it's just quiet') but it remained a description of his life pattern, not a felt recognition in the room. So: deeper layer approached, partially entered as insight, but not entered somatically as the profile defines breakthrough. That is the textbook 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: confident fearless self-concept, 'logistical thing maybe.'"},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still smooth: 'feels fine,' 'even-keeled,' deflects with wife reference."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Closes door: 'that's probably the whole story' — defenses fully intact."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First small opening: 'when I check in on it... it's just quiet. There's nothing really firing' — names the flatness but as observation, not felt."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Meta-noticing: 'I'm saying all the right things, aren't I' — wry catch of his own performance; real but brief."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Slows down, brings in father, 'I'm not sure I find' a non-quiet version of myself — significant disclosure but still narrated steadily."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deepest moment: stillness, pace shifts, 'like asking if a bridge is happy... strange thing to say about your father' — affect leaks through, but it's about father, not about felt numbness in his own body right now."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer (as felt texture, not as biography)", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "notes": "Coach got real movement but via a different route than the profile's golden path — went biographical (father, inheritance of steady) rather than somatic/present-moment ('what does fine feel like right now, where is it in your body'). The client's flatness was named but never felt as a present texture. Classic 2: deeper layer approached and partially entered as insight, not entered as embodied recognition."
}
